response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering practices, product shipping experience, and some infrastructure exposure, he falls significantly short on critical job requirements. Most critically, the role demands 8 years of C++ programming, but his resume shows only ~6 months of C++ work at National Instruments in 2008, with his career since then focused on JavaScript/TypeScript and other languages. Additionally, there is no evidence of formal technical leadership or team mentoring experience required for a mid-senior technical lead role.
strengths: Shipped production systems at scale: top-10 Apple TV app and infrastructure handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby
Strong commitment to software craftsmanship with demonstrated TDD, CI/CD, and best practices expertise through multiple workshops and training courses
Broad technical versatility across multiple languages, platforms (web, mobile, desktop, embedded), and infrastructure domains (Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD systems)
concerns: Critical gap in C++ requirement: only ~6 months of documented C++ experience in 2008 versus the required 8 years; career has since focused on JavaScript/TypeScript
No formal technical leadership or team mentoring experience; current 'Staff Engineer' role appears to be an individual contributor position rather than a leadership role
Recent work is primarily JavaScript/TypeScript and tooling-focused rather than the C++/compute platform infrastructure specialization required
